input_text: Rules that could lead to a doctoral candidate to get fail their promotion
NL_requirements: If plagiarism is detected, the system must terminate the promotion process.
If the defense grade is less than 3.0, the system must trigger the fail promotion activity.
The examination committee must be the resource that conducts the defense.
The thesis must be submitted before the defense can be conducted.
If the thesis status is set to rejected, the system must ensure the defense is not conducted.
The defense must be conducted within 15,552,000 seconds (180 days) of the thesis submission.
The system must send the finalGrade data object during the issue grade activity.
The candidate must complete coursework before the defense is conducted.
If the system fails to notify the candidate of the result, it must log a system error.
The thesis must be submitted by the specified submission deadline.
citations: No grounding metadata was used in the Answer.
